subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the King, the True, the Manifest, which have verily been sent down from the dominion of ancient glory. O youth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک الحق المبین قد نزلت بالحق من جبروت عز قدیم ان یا غلام
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
